summary: Surah Al-Mumtahina guides believers on how to interact with non-Muslims, distinguishing between those who are hostile and those who are peaceful. It sets examples from the life of Ibrahim, outlines the rules for allegiance, and emphasizes fairness and justice. The surah addresses the testing of believing migrant women and the conditions for their marriage, and warns against alliances with those whom Allah has cursed.

groups.title: Section: Do not befriend Allah’s and your enemies; secret overtures are betrayal
